title: grewia humblotii
intro: Grewia humblotii, also known as the Malagasy velvet apple or Velvet Apple, is a species of plant in the family Malvaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant properties. Grewia humblotii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in folk remedies in Madagascar and other parts of Africa.
